qry:select.name: RS0
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_ape_y_nom TEXT , oi_referencia PID FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, per02_personal_emp, per01_personal WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp = per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp and per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal and oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_postulante TEXT , oi_referencia PID FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, sel01_postulante WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante = sel01_postulante.oi_postulante and oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_referencia ID, c_referencia CODE, d_referencia TEXT, oi_req PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS WHERE oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_req ID, c_req CODE, d_req TEXT, oi_empresa PID FROM SEL02_REQ WHERE oi_req={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_empresa ID, c_empresa CODE, d_empresa TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_empresa ID, c_empresa CODE, d_empresa TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE c_empresa={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_req ID, c_req CODE, d_req TEXT FROM SEL02_REQ WHERE c_req={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_referencia ID, c_referencia CODE, d_referencia TEXT FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS WHERE c_referencia={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND oi_req={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_ape_y_nom TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, per02_personal_emp, per01_personal WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp = per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp and per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal and c_reclutado={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS04
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_postulante TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, sel01_postulante WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante = sel01_postulante.oi_postulante and c_reclutado={substring_before(#SOURCE:@SUB_SEARCH,\'-\')} AND oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_referencia ID, c_referencia CODE, d_referencia TEXT, oi_req PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS WHERE oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_req ID, c_req CODE, d_req TEXT, oi_empresa PID FROM SEL02_REQ WHERE oi_req={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_empresa ID, c_empresa CODE, d_empresa TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_reclutado TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_referencia ID, c_referencia CODE, d_referencia TEXT, oi_req PID FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS WHERE oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_req ID, c_req CODE, d_req TEXT, oi_empresa PID FROM SEL02_REQ WHERE oi_req={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS5
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_empresa ID, c_empresa CODE, d_empresa TEXT FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@PID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select oi_referencia from SEL13_RECLUTADOS where oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_ape_y_nom TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, per02_personal_emp, per01_personal WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp = per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp and per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal and oi_referencia=={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS0
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_postulante TEXT FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, sel01_postulante WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante = sel01_postulante.oi_postulante and oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@PARENTID} ')/ROWS/ROW
